title: cassia tomentella
intro: Cassia tomentella, also known as the velvet cassia, is a tropical flowering plant native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Cassia tomentella can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
